channel.title: MindExtract
channel.description: MindExtract — download and transcribe video from anywhere

item.title: Version 1.5.12
item.description:
What's New in 1.5.12

  • Better speaker diarization — Tuned clustering threshold to reduce phantom speaker detection (fewer false "Speaker 3" results)
  • Speaker turn grouping — Consecutive segments from the same speaker are now merged into paragraphs, matching MacWhisper's clean layout
  • Speaker timestamps — Each speaker turn now shows the timestamp (e.g., "Speaker 1 · 00:41") for easy navigation
